1 2020-05-31 kobuki_firmware
Firmware blobs for kobuki.

2 2020-01-15 kobuki_ftdi
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.

1 kobuki
2 2022-02-13 kobuki_auto_docking
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
 
2 2022-02-13 kobuki_bumper2pc
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
 
1 kobuki_capabilities
2 2022-02-13 kobuki_controller_tutorial
Code for the Kobuki controller tutorial.
Code for the Kobuki controller tutorial.
 
2 2022-10-24 kobuki_core
Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki.
Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki.
 
1 kobuki_dashboard
2 2022-02-13 kobuki_description
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package.
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package.

ROS 2 runtime software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.

1 2020-01-14 kobuki_ros_interfaces
 
1 kobuki_rviz_launchers
2 2022-02-13 kobuki_safety_controller
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!
 
1 kobuki_soft
1 kobuki_softapps
1 kobuki_softnode

Kobuki test suite: this package provides tools to thoroughly test Kobuki's hardware.

APIs for storing and querying information about the world. Provides C++ and Python API's to make getting facts in and out easy (while still exposing a full SQL interface). Supports PostgreSQL and MySQL backends.

2 2020-09-16 kobuki_dock_drive
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
 
2 2020-09-16 kobuki_driver
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
 
1 kobuki_firmware
2 2020-09-16 kobuki_ftdi
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.

1 2020-10-12 kobuki
Software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
Software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
 
2 2020-10-12 kobuki_auto_docking
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
 
2 2020-10-12 kobuki_bumper2pc
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.

2 2020-09-16 kobuki_core
Non-ROS software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
Non-ROS software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
 
1 2021-03-21 kobuki_dashboard
The Kobuki dashboard is a RQT-based plug-in for visualising data from Kobuki and giving easy access to basic functionalities.
The Kobuki dashboard is a RQT-based plug-in for visualising data from Kobuki and giving easy access to basic functionalities.
 
2 2020-10-12 kobuki_description
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
 
1 2021-03-21 kobuki_desktop
Visualisation and simulation tools for Kobuki
Visualisation and simulation tools for Kobuki
 
2 2020-09-16 kobuki_dock_drive
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
 
2 2020-09-16 kobuki_driver
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
 
1 kobuki_firmware
2 2020-09-16 kobuki_ftdi
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
 
1 2021-03-21 kobuki_gazebo
Kobuki simulation for Gazebo
Kobuki simulation for Gazebo
 
1 2021-03-21 kobuki_gazebo_plugins
Kobuki-specific ROS plugins for Gazebo
Kobuki-specific ROS plugins for Gazebo
 
2 2020-10-12 kobuki_keyop
Keyboard teleoperation for Kobuki: relays commands from a keyboard to Kobuki.
Keyboard teleoperation for Kobuki: relays commands from a keyboard to Kobuki.
 
1 kobuki_led_controller
1 kobuki_msgs
2 2020-10-12 kobuki_node
ROS nodelet for Kobuki: ROS wrapper for the Kobuki driver.
ROS nodelet for Kobuki: ROS wrapper for the Kobuki driver.
 
1 2021-03-21 kobuki_qtestsuite
An rqt plugin that provides a graphical, interactive testsuite for Kobuki.
An rqt plugin that provides a graphical, interactive testsuite for Kobuki.
 
2 2020-10-12 kobuki_random_walker
Random walker app for Kobuki
Random walker app for Kobuki
 
1 2020-10-12 kobuki_rapps
Robot apps for Kobuki
Robot apps for Kobuki
 
1 kobuki_ros
1 kobuki_ros_interfaces
1 2021-03-21 kobuki_rviz_launchers
The kobuki_rviz_launchers package
The kobuki_rviz_launchers package
 
2 2020-10-12 kobuki_safety_controller
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!
 
1 kobuki_soft
1 kobuki_softapps
1 kobuki_softnode
2 2020-10-12 kobuki_testsuite
Kobuki test suite: this package provides tools to thoroughly test Kobuki's hardware.
Kobuki test suite: this package provides tools to thoroughly test Kobuki's hardware.

1 2021-07-01 kvh_geo_fog_3d
Provides a driver node for KVH GEO FOG 3D INS sensors, messages, and rviz plugins.
Provides a driver node for KVH GEO FOG 3D INS sensors, messages, and rviz plugins.
 
1 2021-07-01 kvh_geo_fog_3d_driver
A ROS driver for the KVH Geo Fog 3D INS family of systems.
A ROS driver for the KVH Geo Fog 3D INS family of systems.

kvh_geo_fog_3d_msgs contains raw messages for the KVH GEO FOG 3D INS devices.

1 kobuki
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_auto_docking
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
 
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_bumper2pc
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
 
1 kobuki_capabilities
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_controller_tutorial
Code for the Kobuki controller tutorial.
Code for the Kobuki controller tutorial.
 
2 2020-01-14 kobuki_core
Non-ROS software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
Non-ROS software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
 
1 kobuki_dashboard
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_description
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
 
1 kobuki_desktop
2 2020-01-14 kobuki_dock_drive
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
 
2 2020-01-14 kobuki_driver
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
 
1 2020-05-31 kobuki_firmware
Firmware blobs for kobuki.
Firmware blobs for kobuki.
 
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_ftdi
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
 
1 kobuki_gazebo
1 kobuki_gazebo_plugins
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_keyop
Keyboard teleoperation for Kobuki: relays commands from a keyboard to Kobuki.
Keyboard teleoperation for Kobuki: relays commands from a keyboard to Kobuki.
 
1 kobuki_led_controller
1 kobuki_msgs
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_node
ROS nodelet for Kobuki: ROS wrapper for the Kobuki driver.
ROS nodelet for Kobuki: ROS wrapper for the Kobuki driver.
 
1 kobuki_qtestsuite
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_random_walker
Random walker app for Kobuki
Random walker app for Kobuki
 
1 kobuki_rapps
1 2020-01-15 kobuki_ros
ROS2 runtime software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
ROS2 runtime software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.
 
1 2020-01-14 kobuki_ros_interfaces
 
1 kobuki_rviz_launchers
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_safety_controller
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!
 
1 kobuki_soft
1 kobuki_softapps
1 kobuki_softnode
2 2020-01-15 kobuki_testsuite
Kobuki test suite: this package provides tools to thoroughly test Kobuki's hardware.
Kobuki test suite: this package provides tools to thoroughly test Kobuki's hardware.
 
2 2022-10-01 kobuki_velocity_smoother
Bound incoming velocity messages according to robot velocity and acceleration limits.
Bound incoming velocity messages according to robot velocity and acceleration limits.

1 2019-07-17 kinova_description
3D model of various Kinova robotic arms. Includes the model and URDF files for working with an arm in RViz or Gazebo.

1 2019-07-17 kinova_driver
The ROS Kinova driver provides a ROS interface for the Kinova Robotics robotic manipulator arms. This stack provides access to the Kinova C++ hardware API through ROS.

1 2016-11-09 kobuki
Software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.

2 2016-11-09 kobuki_auto_docking
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
 
2 2016-11-09 kobuki_bumper2pc
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
 
1 2016-11-09 kobuki_capabilities

2 2016-11-09 kobuki_controller_tutorial

2 2016-11-09 kobuki_core
Non-ROS software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.

1 2015-03-02 kobuki_dashboard
The Kobuki dashboard is a RQT-based plug-in for visualising data from Kobuki and giving easy access to basic functionalities.
The Kobuki dashboard is a RQT-based plug-in for visualising data from Kobuki and giving easy access to basic functionalities.
 
2 2016-11-09 kobuki_description
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
 
1 2015-03-02 kobuki_desktop
Visualisation and simulation tools for Kobuki
Visualisation and simulation tools for Kobuki
 
2 2016-11-09 kobuki_dock_drive
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
 
2 2016-11-09 kobuki_driver
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
 
1 kobuki_firmware
2 2016-11-09 kobuki_ftdi
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.

Kobuki simulation for Gazebo

Kobuki-specific ROS plugins for Gazebo

Keyboard teleoperation for Kobuki: relays commands from a keyboard to Kobuki.

2 2016-11-09 kobuki_safety_controller
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!

1 2014-05-09 kurt_2dnav
This application allows the Kurt robot to navigate autonomously with a pre-specified static map. This package is modeled after pr2_2dnav.
This application allows the Kurt robot to navigate autonomously with a pre-specified static map. This package is modeled after pr2_2dnav.
 
1 2014-05-09 kurt_2dnav_slam
This application allows the Kurt to navigate autonomously while also building a map of its environment as it drives along. It is modeled after pr2_2dnav_slam.
This application allows the Kurt to navigate autonomously while also building a map of its environment as it drives along. It is modeled after pr2_2dnav_slam.

1 2014-06-25 kdl_acc_solver

2 2015-12-09 kdl_parser
The Kinematics and Dynamics Library (KDL) defines a tree structure to represent the kinematic and dynamic parameters of a robot mechanism.
The Kinematics and Dynamics Library (KDL) defines a tree structure to represent the kinematic and dynamic parameters of a robot mechanism.
 
1 kdl_parser_py
1 2015-02-05 kdl_typekit
This package contains the KDL RTT bindings

1 2014-10-29 kdl_wrapper
C++ wrapper for easily using KDL kinematic solvers with robots defined in ROS through URDF files. Wraps the kdl and kdl_parser packages for generating KDL kinematic chains from URDF by just taking as inputs the IDs of the root and tip of the kinematic chain of a robot manipulator.
C++ wrapper for easily using KDL kinematic solvers with robots defined in ROS through URDF files. Wraps the kdl and kdl_parser packages for generating KDL kinematic chains from URDF by just taking as inputs the IDs of the root and tip of the kinematic chain of a robot manipulator.

2 2014-08-20 kobuki_safety_controller
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Kobuki. The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two, Kobuki is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Kobuki is stopped. This controller can be enabled/disabled. The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!

This application allows the Kurt robot to navigate autonomously with a pre-specified static map. This package is modeled after pr2_2dnav.

1 2014-05-09 kurt_2dnav_slam
This application allows the Kurt to navigate autonomously while also building a map of its environment as it drives along. It is modeled after pr2_2dnav_slam.

Software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.

2 2018-03-15 kobuki_auto_docking
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
Automatic docking for Kobuki: Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to let Kobuki find its nest autonomously.
 
2 2018-03-15 kobuki_bumper2pc
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.
Bumper/cliff to pointcloud nodelet: Publish bumpers and cliff sensors events as points in a pointcloud, so navistack can use them for poor-man navigation. Implemented as a nodelet intended to run together with kobuki_node.

Non-ROS software for Kobuki, Yujin Robot's mobile research base.

1 2018-04-29 kobuki_dashboard
The Kobuki dashboard is a RQT-based plug-in for visualising data from Kobuki and giving easy access to basic functionalities.
The Kobuki dashboard is a RQT-based plug-in for visualising data from Kobuki and giving easy access to basic functionalities.
 
2 2018-03-15 kobuki_description
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
Description of the Kobuki model. Provides the model description of Kobuki for simulation and visualisation. The files in this package are parsed and used by a variety of other components. Most users will not interact directly with this package. WARNING: This package is disabled because it cannot be catkinized by now, as xacro dependency is not catkin still. In the interim we use a unary pre-catkin stack named kobuki_description.
 
1 2018-04-29 kobuki_desktop
Visualisation and simulation tools for Kobuki

2 2020-09-16 kobuki_dock_drive
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
Dock driving library for Kobuki. Users owning a docking station for Kobuki can use this tool to develop autonomous docking drive algorithms.
 
2 2020-09-16 kobuki_driver
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
C++ driver library for Kobuki: Pure C++ driver library for Kobuki. This is for those who do not wish to use ROS on their systems.
 
1 kobuki_firmware
2 2020-09-16 kobuki_ftdi
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
Utilities for flashing and enabling Kobuki's USB connection. This package contains tools for flashing the Kobuki's FTDI chip (usually done at the factory). The special firmware for the FTDI chip (USB to serial converter) enables it to appear as /dev/kobuki on the user's PC.
